zh.lifeSummary: Catharine Ann Woolf是Molly Fludd的女兒，於大約1818年出生在美國印第安納州哈里森。她於1837年4月6日與John A Tresenriter Jr在美國印第安納州哈里森結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她於1850年住在美國印第安納州弗洛伊德格奧智托 堂史普格奧智托。她去世於1861年3月11日享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: Woolf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Wolf   or   Wolfe  .
Americanized form of North German, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Wulf   or   Wulff  .

variants.name: Wolf
meanings: German, English, Dutch, and Danish: from a short form of the various ancient Germanic compound names with the first element wolf ‘wolf’, or a byname or nickname with this meaning, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a wolf. The wolf was native throughout the forests of Europe, including Britain, until comparatively recently. In ancient and medieval times it played an important role in ancient Germanic mythology, being regarded as one of the sacred beasts of Woden. The surname of German origin is also found in many other parts of Europe, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, Hungary, Czechia, Slovakia, Slovenia, and Croatia, often as a German translation of local equivalents. In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Farkas , Czech and Slovak Vlk , Slovenian Volk , Ukrainian and Slovenian Vovk , Slovenian, Croatian, and Serbian Vuk , and also Czech, Slovenian, Croatian, Slovak, and Hungarian Volf . In part, this is a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname, originating from the Kočevsko region in Lower Carniola, Slovenia (see Kocevar ). Compare De Wolf , Wolfe , Wolff , Woolf , Woulfe , and Wulf .

Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the Yiddish male personal name Volf meaning ‘wolf’, which is associated with the Hebrew personal name Binyamin (see Benjamin ). This association stems from Jacob's dying words ‘Benjamin shall ravin as a wolf: in the morning he shall devour the prey, and at night he shall divide the spoil’ (Genesis 49:27). Compare Volf .

nameMeanings.name: Catharine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.
Historical Boundaries: 1819: Floyd, Indiana, United States

historicEvents.title: The Second Great Awakening
historicEvents.description: Being a second spiritual and religious awakening, like the First Great Awakening, many Churches began to spring up from other denominations. Many people began to rapidly join the Baptist and Methodist congregations. Many converts to these religions believed that the Awakening was the precursor of a new millennial age.
Historical Boundaries: 1833: Floyd, Indiana, United States

historicEvents.title: Indiana Nears Bankruptcy
historicEvents.description: The State of Indiana was near bankruptcy in 1841 due to the inability to repay interest incurred for the Massive Internal Improvement Act. The state liquidated much of its public works. Many of the projects were handed over to the state’s creditors as a way to reduce debt. Only two of the eight proposed infrastructure projects were completed by the creditors.
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.

historicEvents.title: The Book of Mormon Published in German
historicEvents.description: On May 25, 1852, the Book of Mormon is published in German.
historicEvents.urlTitle: The Book of Mormon Published in German

historicEvents.title: The Town of Santa Claus
historicEvents.description: The town of Santa Fe was denied their application for a United States Postal Service as a town of Santa Fe, Indiana, was already established. Several meetings were held and the name was changed to Santa Claus, Indiana. The United States Postal Service granted their application. Due to the name, the post office in Santa Claus continues to receive thousands of letters to Santa Claus from children around the world each December.

en.lifeSummary: Catharine Ann Woolf was born about 1818, in Harrison, Indiana, United States as the daughter of Molly Fludd. She married John A Tresenriter Jr on 6 April 1837, in Harrison, Indiana, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. She lived in Georgetown, Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, United States in 1850. She died on 11 March 1861, at the age of 44.

it.lifeSummary: Catharine Ann Woolf è nata il circa 1818 nel Harrison, Indiana, Stati Uniti d'America come figlia di Molly Fludd. Lei sposato John A Tresenriter Jr il 6 aprile 1837, nel Harrison, Indiana, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Georgetown, Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1850. Morì il 11 marzo 1861, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catharine Ann Woolfは約1818年にアメリカ合衆国インディアナ州ハーリソンでMolly Fluddの娘として生まれた。1837年4月6日にアメリカ合衆国インディアナ州ハーリソンでJohn A Tresenriter Jrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1850年にはアメリカ合衆国インディアナ州フロイドジョージェトウン トウンシュイップジョージェトウンに住んでいた。彼女は1861年3月11日に44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catharine Ann Woolf(은)는 대략 1818년 미국 인디애나 주 해리슨에서 Molly Fludd의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1837년 4월 6일 미국 인디애나 주 해리슨에서 John A Tresenriter Jr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1850년도에 미국 인디애나 주 플로이드 조짓운 타운시프 조짓운에서 살았다. 그녀는 1861년 3월 11일 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Catharine Ann Woolf nasceu aproximadamente 1818, em Harrison, Indiana, Estados Unidos da América filha de Molly Fludd. Ela casou-se com John A Tresenriter Jr em 6 de abril de 1837, em Harrison, Indiana, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela viveu em Georgetown, Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, Estados Unidos da América em 1850. Ela faleceu em 11 de março de 1861, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Catharine Ann Woolf родилась около 1818 г. в местности харрисон, Индиана, Соединенные штаты. Её мать звали Molly Fludd. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John A Tresenriter Jr 6 апреля 1837 г. в местности харрисон, Индиана, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Она жила в местности джеоргетоун, джеоргетоун тоуншип, флоид, Индиана, Соединенные штаты в 1850 году. Она умерла 11 марта 1861 г. в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Catharine Ann Woolf nació aproximadamente 1818, en Harrison, Indiana, Estados Unidos como hija de Molly Fludd. Se casó con John A Tresenriter Jr el 6 de abril de 1837, en Harrison, Indiana, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Georgetown, Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, Estados Unidos en 1850. Murió el 11 de marzo de 1861, a la edad de 44 años.
